scripts.bundle:monitor: npm run build && npm run bundle:analyze
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.fix-all: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.clean:reports: rm -rf playwright-report test-results coverage audit-outputs security-audit-history.json || true
scripts.clean:dev: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:reports && npm run clean:cache && rm -rf node_modules && npm install
scripts.check-all: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run audit:deps
scripts.test-all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:quick: npm run test && npm run test:dev
scripts.test:full: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.audit:security:fix: npm audit fix && npm run audit:security
scripts.audit:perf: npm run build && npm start & sleep 5 && npm run lighthouse
scripts.audit:perf:ci: npm run build && npm run monitor:performance
scripts.update-deps: npx npm-check-updates -u && npm install && npm test
scripts.ci: npm run fix-all && npm run build && npm run test:all
scripts.dev-setup: npm run clean:all && npm run fix-all && npm run dev
scripts.pre-commit: npm run fix-all && npm run test:quick
scripts.pre-push: npm run check-all && npm run test:full && npm run build
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run fix-all && npm run test && npm run build:analyze && npm run audit:deps
scripts.monitor-all: npm run audit:security && npm run bundle:analyze && npm run monitor:performance
scripts.health-check: npm run check-all && npm run monitor-all
scripts.deploy: npm run clean && npm run release && echo '✅ Ready for deployment!'
scripts.debug: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run build
